note: Per-donor-pair DE retains ONLY perturbations reproducibly detected in BOTH donors of the pair -> same 2591-gene reproducible core in every pair. This is the concrete 'effective N is small' evidence (v3 Fix 6).

consequence_for_design.recovery_gold_genes_in_donor_pairs: CD226 and 6/8 gold genes ABSENT from donor-pair set -> blinded recovery MUST use the pooled (perturbation-blocked) data; donor-blocked conformal is the headline, recovery stays a pooled-data case study (reinforces Fix 6).
consequence_for_design.rasgrp1_veto_bonus: RASGRP1 present in all 6 pairs -> can show its LOW cross-donor reproducibility directly on donor-resolved data (strengthens the veto).
